case_title: MASON HOLDING VS. VETERANS CAB CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,690.04 FILED BY HOLDING, MASON AS TO DEFENDANT VETERANS CAB CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-06-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VETERANS CAB CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VETERANS CAB CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2008 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-06-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT SCHEDULES THIS CASE FOR FURTHER TESTIMONY CONCERNING THE DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFFF'S CAR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED IN THE COURT FILE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLDING, MASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VETERANS CAB CORPORATION THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
